prose:
The attempt to calculate the frontier orbitals of aniline using DFT (B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set at tier 'standard') in the gas phase was unsuccessful due to a technical issue. The error message from the chemkit tool indicates that the argument `--phase` is not recognized, which likely caused the engine run to fail. 

The error output from the engine included technical debugging messages regarding configuration with "ONEAPI_DEVICE_SELECTOR." You can watch the live log for more details: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/argo_gpt-4o/20260703-225857_aniline_frontier_orbitals/frontier_20260703-225905.out`. No numerical results were generated.
